ground_truth:
**Weekly Activities Schedule** for **VIC Health Club**. Each class is displayed in a colour-coded rounded **pill** shape containing: a black **icon on a white disc** (left side), and white text on multiple lines with times, class title, and optional additional info.

**Colour groups (verified 2026-06-19)**:
- Blue = Yoga (5 classes)
- Orange = Shaolin (3 classes)
- Green = Fitness (3 classes)

**Full schedule (verified 2026-06-19)**:

| Day | Time | Class | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Monday | 12:00-13:00 | **Shaolin QIGONG** | orange/Shaolin |
| Monday | 13:00-14:00 | **YOGA** | with the Embassy of India |
| Monday | 13:10-14:00 | **OSTEOPOROSIS Prevention** | (overlapping slot) |
| Tuesday | 12:00-13:00 | **YOGASTHENICS** | green/Fitness |
| Tuesday | 13:00-14:00 | **YOGA** | with the Embassy of India |
| Tuesday | 13:00-14:00 | **TAIJI (24 forms)** | with Gabi |
| Wednesday | 12:00-13:00 | **CALISTHENICS** | w/ VIC Runners |
| Wednesday | 13:00-14:00 | **YOGA** | |
| Thursday | 12:00-13:00 | **Shaolin KUNG FU** | orange/Shaolin |
| Thursday | 13:00-14:00 | **YOGA** | |
| Friday | 13:00-14:00 | **PRANAYAMA** | |

Total: 11 classes across Mon-Fri, all in lunch hour slots (12:00-13:00 or 13:00-14:00).

**Icons per type**:
- Same silhouette doing martial arts → all Shaolin practices (Qigong, Kung Fu)
- Same sitting silhouette meditating or yoga posing → all Yoga classes
- Head blowing wind → Pranayama
- Gym weight → Yogasthenics
- Person running → Calisthenics
- Person standing up from a squat → Osteoporosis Prevention

Footer: black bar with **"Register online at https://vichealth.club"** and a QR code. Background has faint lotus flower and ink-wash brush stroke decorations.

---

responses.content:
# Image Description: VIC Health Club Weekly Activities Schedule

This image is a clean, modern graphic design of a weekly activity schedule for a fitness center called "VIC Health Club." The layout is vertical, organized into a header, a main schedule body, and a footer.

## Header and Legend
At the top left is a logo consisting of a heart shape formed by two stylized figures reaching toward each other. To the right of the logo is the text **"VIC Health Club"** in a bold, black sans-serif font.

Below this is the main title: **"WEEKLY ACTIVITIES SCHEDULE"** in large, bold, black capital letters.

Underneath the title is a color-coded legend:
*   **Blue dot:** Yoga
*   **Orange dot:** Shaolin
*   **Green dot:** Fitness

The background of the entire image is an off-white/light gray color featuring large, faint, stylized outlines of lotus flowers.

## Weekly Schedule
The schedule is organized into five white rounded rectangles, one for each day of the week from Monday to Friday. Each activity is contained within a smaller colored pill-shaped button featuring a white icon and text.

### Monday
*   **12:00 - 13:00:** Shaolin IGONG (Orange button, icon of a person in a martial arts stance)
*   **13:00 - 14:00:** YOGA with the Embassy of India (Blue button, icon of a person in a yoga pose)
*   **13:10 - 14:10:** OSTEOPOROSIS Prevention (Green button, icon of a person with a walking stick)

### Tuesday
*   **12:00 - 13:00:** YOGASTHENICS (Green button, icon of a person in a yoga/strength pose)
*   **13:00 - 14:00:** YOGA with the Embassy of India (Blue button, icon of a person in a yoga pose)
*   **13:10 - 14:10:** TAJI (24 forms) with Gabi (Orange button, icon of a person in a martial arts stance)

### Wednesday
*   **12:00 - 13:00:** CALISTHENICS (w/ VIC Runners) (Green button, icon of a person running)
*   **13:30 - 14:00:** YOGA (Blue button, icon of a person in a yoga pose)

### Thursday
*   **12:00 - 13:00:** Shaolin KUNG FU (Orange button, icon of a person in a martial arts stance)
*   **13:30 - 14:00:** YOGA (Blue button, icon of a person in a yoga pose)

### Friday
*   **13:00 - 14:00:** PRANAYAMA (Blue button, icon of a person in a meditative pose)

## Footer
At the bottom of the image is a dark gray/black horizontal bar. It contains the following white text:
**"Register online at https://vichealth.club"**

On the far right of this bottom bar is a large, white QR code.

## Visual Style and Colors
*   **Color Palette:** The primary colors are white, light gray, navy blue, orange, and forest green, set against a dark gray/black footer.
*   **Typography:** A clean, modern sans-serif font is used throughout.
*   **Icons:** Simple white line-art icons are used to represent different types of physical activities.
*   **Layout:** The design is highly structured and easy to read, using white space and rounded corners to separate different sections and days.

This is a detailed description of the provided image, which is a weekly activities schedule for the VIC Health Club.

### Overall Layout and Style
The image is a vertically oriented infographic designed with a clean, modern, and professional aesthetic. It uses a white background with light grey decorative elements, such as faint lotus flower outlines and flowing wave patterns. The information is organized into three main sections: a header, a central schedule area, and a footer. The color palette is composed of white, light grey, dark navy/black, light blue, orange, and green.

At the top of the image, the header contains the club's branding and a legend for the schedule.

* **Logo:** On the top left, there is a black circular emblem. Inside the circle is a heart, flanked by two stylized hands or wings, all enclosed within a laurel wreath.
* **Club Name:** To the right of the logo, the text "**VIC Health Club**" is written in a large, black, sans-serif font.
* **Main Title:** Below the club name, the text "**WEEKLY ACTIVITIES SCHEDULE**" appears in large, all-caps, black, sans-serif font.

    * An orange circle followed by the text "**Shaolin**"
    * A green circle followed by the text "**Fitness**"

### Weekly Activities Schedule
The middle section contains the core information, organized by day of the week. Each day is presented in a large, white, rounded-corner rectangular box. The name of the day is written in large, grey, sans-serif text on the left side of each box. The activities are represented by colored, pill-shaped buttons containing an icon, a time range, and the activity name.

**Monday**
* **Orange button:** Icon of a person in a martial arts pose. Text: "**12:00 - 13:00 Shaolin QIGONG**"
* **Blue button:** Icon of a person in a yoga pose. Text: "**13:00 - 14:00 YOGA with the Embassy of India**"

**Tuesday**

* **Blue button:** Icon of a person in a yoga pose. Text: "**13:00 - 14:00 YOGA**"

**Thursday**
* **Orange button:** Icon of a person in a martial arts pose. Text: "**12:00 - 13:00 Shaolin KUNG FU**"
* **Blue button:** Icon of a person in a yoga pose. Text: "**13:00 - 14:00 YOGA**"

**Friday**
* **Blue button:** Icon of a person in a meditation pose. Text: "**13:00 - 14:00 PRANAYAMA**"

### Footer Section
The bottom of the image features a dark navy/black bar containing registration information.

* **Registration Text:** On the left side of the bar, the text "**Register online at https://vichealth.club**" is written in white, sans-serif font.
* **QR Code:** On the right side of the bar, there is a large, black and white QR code.

# Image Overview and Layout

The image is a digital poster or flyer presenting the "VIC Health Club Weekly Activities Schedule." The layout is clean, modern, and highly structured, utilizing a vertical flow. The schedule is organized by the days of the week (Monday through Friday), with each day containing specific activity blocks detailing the time, activity name, and instructor/group. The overall design is minimalist, featuring a white background with colored blocks to differentiate activities.

# Visual Elements and Color Palette

**Color Palette:** The primary colors used are white (background), deep black (text), and three distinct accent colors for the activities:
*   **Blue:** Represents Yoga.
*   **Orange:** Represents Shaolin activities (QIGONG, Kung Fu, Taiji).
*   **Green:** Represents Fitness activities (Osteoporosis Prevention, Yogasthenia, Calisthenics).

**Objects and Icons:** The schedule uses small, stylized icons next to each activity block to visually represent the type of exercise (e.g., a heart/wreath for the club logo, a person in a yoga pose, weights, a running figure, etc.).

**People:** No actual people are visible; the schedule uses icons and names (like "Gabi" and "VIC Runners") to indicate instructors or groups.

# Text and Content (Verbatim)

## Titles and Branding
*   **Club Name:** VIC Health Club
*   **Main Title:** WEEKLY ACTIVITIES SCHEDULE
*   **Legend/Key:**
    *   Blue icon/text: Yoga
    *   Orange icon/text: Shaolin
    *   Green icon/text: Fitness

*   13:10 - 14:00: OSTEOPOROS Prevention

**Tuesday**

**Thursday**

*   13:00 - 14:00: YOGA

**Friday**
*   13:00 - 14:00: PRANAYAMA

## Footer and Call to Action

# Notable Features

**Branding:** The club logo features a heart enclosed within a laurel wreath, symbolizing health and wellness.
**QR Code:** A prominent QR code is located in the bottom right corner, linked to the registration URL.
**Design Flow:** The schedule is highly readable, with clear separation between days and activities, making it easy for users to quickly find specific classes.
**Time Slots:** All activities are scheduled within 1-hour time slots (e.g., 12:00 - 13:00).

# VIC Health Club Weekly Activities Schedule

## Header and Logo
The top of the image features the logo and name of the "VIC Health Club". The logo is a black circular emblem containing a heart shape held by two hands, encircled by a laurel wreath. To the right of the logo, the text "VIC Health Club" is displayed in a bold, black, sans-serif font. Below this, the main title "WEEKLY ACTIVITIES SCHEDULE" is prominently displayed in a large, bold, black, uppercase sans-serif font.

## Legend
Immediately below the main title, a legend explains the color coding for the activities:
- A blue circle represents "Yoga".
- An orange circle represents "Shaolin".
- A green circle represents "Fitness".

## Day-by-Day Schedule

### Monday
- **12:00 - 13:00**: An orange oval contains a black silhouette of a person in a Shaolin stance, with the text "Shaolin QIGONG".
- **13:00 - 14:00**: A blue oval contains a black silhouette of a person in a yoga pose, with the text "YOGA with the Embassy of India".
- **13:10 - 14:00**: A green oval contains a black silhouette of a person with arms raised, with the text "OSTEOPOROSIS Prevention".

### Tuesday

- **13:00 - 14:00**: An orange oval contains a black silhouette of a person in a martial arts stance, with the text "TAIJI (24 forms) with Gabi".

### Wednesday
- **12:00 - 13:00**: A green oval contains a black silhouette of a running person, with the text "CALISTHENICS (w/ VIC Runners)".
- **13:00 - 14:00**: A blue oval contains a black silhouette of a person in a yoga pose, with the text "YOGA".

### Thursday
- **12:00 - 13:00**: An orange oval contains a black silhouette of a person in a martial arts stance, with the text "Shaolin KUNG FU".
- **13:00 - 14:00**: A blue oval contains a black silhouette of a person in a yoga pose, with the text "YOGA".

## Footer
The bottom of the image contains a dark gray banner with white text: "Register online at https://vichealth.club". To the right of this text is a black-and-white QR code.

## Design and Layout
The layout is clean and organized, with each day presented in a separate, rounded rectangular section. The background is a light beige color, with subtle, faded gray lotus flower patterns in the corners and a large, abstract gray brushstroke design on the right side. The text is primarily black, with the activity labels using the corresponding color from the legend. The overall design is modern and professional, conveying a sense of health and wellness.

# VIC Health Club Weekly Activities Schedule

This image is a weekly activities schedule for the VIC Health Club, presented in a clean, organized, and visually appealing format.

## Header and Logo

*   **Logo**: In the top-left corner, there is a black logo featuring two hands cupping a heart, which is encircled by a laurel wreath.
*   **Club Name**: To the right of the logo, the text "VIC Health Club" is displayed in a bold, black font.
*   **Title**: Below the club name, the main title "WEEKLY ACTIVITIES SCHEDULE" is written in large, bold, black capital letters.
*   **Decorative Element**: A faint, light gray outline of a lotus flower is visible in the top-right corner, adding a serene aesthetic.

## Legend

Below the main title, a color-coded legend explains the categories of activities:
*   **Blue Circle**: Yoga
*   **Orange Circle**: Shaolin
*   **Green Circle**: Fitness

## Daily Schedule

The schedule is organized by day, from Monday to Friday, with each day presented in its own white, rounded rectangular box.

### Monday

*   **12:00 - 13:00**: An orange bar indicates a **Shaolin QIGONG** session. The icon is a black silhouette of a person in a martial arts stance.
*   **13:00 - 14:00**: A blue bar indicates a **YOGA** session "with the Embassy of India". The icon is a black silhouette of a person in a seated yoga pose.
*   **13:10 - 14:00**: A green bar indicates an **OSTEOPOROSIS Prevention** session. The icon is a black silhouette of a person lifting weights.

### Tuesday

*   **12:00 - 13:00**: A green bar indicates **YOGASTHENICS**. The icon is a black silhouette of a person lifting a barbell.
*   **13:00 - 14:00**: A blue bar indicates a **YOGA** session "with the Embassy of India". The icon is a black silhouette of a person in a seated yoga pose.
*   **13:00 - 14:00**: An orange bar indicates a **TAIJI (24 forms)** session "with Gabi". The icon is a black silhouette of a person in a Tai Chi stance.

### Wednesday

*   **12:00 - 13:00**: A green bar indicates **CALISTHENICS (w/ VIC Runners)**. The icon is a black silhouette of a person running.
*   **13:00 - 14:00**: A blue bar indicates a **YOGA** session. The icon is a black silhouette of a person in a seated yoga pose.

### Thursday

*   **12:00 - 13:00**: An orange bar indicates a **Shaolin KUNG FU** session. The icon is a black silhouette of a person in a martial arts stance.
*   **13:00 - 14:00**: A blue bar indicates a **YOGA** session. The icon is a black silhouette of a person in a seated yoga pose.

### Friday

*   **13:00 - 14:00**: A blue bar indicates a **PRANAYAMA** session. The icon is a black silhouette of a person's head and shoulders, with lines indicating breath.

## Footer

*   A black banner spans the bottom of the image.
*   It contains the text: "Register online at https://vichealth.club" in white font.
*   To the right of the text, there is a black-and-white QR code.

## Overall Layout and Design

*   **Background**: The background is a light beige color.
*   **Color Scheme**: The design uses a palette of black, white, blue, orange, and green to differentiate activities and create visual hierarchy.
*   **Icons**: Each activity is accompanied by a simple, black silhouette icon that visually represents the type of exercise.
*   **Typography**: The text is clean and modern, with bold fonts for headings and clear, readable fonts for the schedule details.
*   **Decorative Elements**: Faint, light gray brushstroke patterns and lotus flower outlines are used as background elements to add texture and a sense of calm without distracting from the information.

This image is a visually structured, color-coded **Weekly Activities Schedule** for the **VIC Health Club**, designed to inform members of daily fitness and wellness offerings from Monday through Friday. The layout is clean, organized by day, with each day’s activities presented in horizontal blocks containing time slots, activity names, icons, and instructors or themes.

---

## 🎨 Overall Design & Layout

- **Background**: Light beige/cream background with subtle gray lotus flower watermarks in corners (top right and left), reinforcing a calm, health-oriented aesthetic.
- **Header Section**:
  - Top-left: Logo of VIC Health Club — a black heart enclosed in laurel wreaths, flanked by two hands holding it.
  - Top-center: Bold black text “VIC Health Club”
  - Below that: Large bold title “WEEKLY ACTIVITIES SCHEDULE”
  - Top-right: Faint gray lotus outline
- **Legend**: Positioned below the title, showing three colored dots with corresponding activity types:
  - Blue dot → Yoga
  - Orange dot → Shaolin
  - Green dot → Fitness
- **Daily Blocks**: Each day (Monday–Friday) is in its own white rounded rectangle with soft drop shadow, stacked vertically.
- **Footer**: Dark navy banner at bottom with white text:  
  > “Register online at https://vichealth.club”  
  Alongside a QR code on the far right.

---

## 📅 Daily Schedule Details

### **Monday**
- **12:00 – 13:00**  
  - Icon: Person in martial arts stance  
  - Text: **Shaolin QIGONG** (orange background)

- **13:00 – 14:00**  
  - Icon: Person in yoga pose  
  - Text: **YOGA** with the Embassy of India (blue background)

- **13:10 – 14:00** *(Note: Overlaps slightly with above)*  
  - Icon: Person lifting weights  
  - Text: **OSTEOPOROSIS Prevention** (green background)

> *Note: There appears to be a scheduling overlap between Yoga and Osteoporosis Prevention on Monday afternoon.*

---

### **Tuesday**
- **12:00 – 13:00**  
  - Icon: Barbell  
  - Text: **YOGASTHENICS** (green background)

- **13:00 – 14:00**  
  - Icon: Person in yoga pose  
  - Text: **YOGA** with the Embassy of India (blue background)

- **13:00 – 14:00** *(Overlap again)*  
  - Icon: Person in martial arts stance  
  - Text: **TAIJI (24 forms)** with Gabi (orange background)

> *Again, there is an overlap between Yoga and Taiji on Tuesday afternoon.*

### **Wednesday**

  - Icon: Running figure  
  - Text: **CALISTHENICS (w/ VIC Runners)** (green background)

- **13:00 – 14:00**

## 🧩 Notable Features

- **Color Coding System**: Consistent use of blue (Yoga), orange (Shaolin), green (Fitness) across all days for quick visual scanning.
- **Iconography**: Simple black silhouettes representing each activity type — enhances readability and thematic consistency.
- **Instructor/Partner Notes**: Some activities specify instructors or partners (e.g., “with Gabi”, “with the Embassy of India”, “w/ VIC Runners”).

# VIC Health Club Weekly Activities Schedule

This is a clean, modern infographic-style weekly schedule for the **VIC Health Club**, designed to display daily fitness and wellness activities from Monday to Friday. The layout uses color-coded categories, icons, and rounded pill-shaped blocks for each activity.

---

## Header Section

- **Logo**: Top-left corner features a black circular logo with two hands cradling a heart, encircled by laurel wreaths.
- **Title**: “VIC Health Club” in bold black sans-serif font next to the logo.
- **Main Heading**: “WEEKLY ACTIVITIES SCHEDULE” in large, bold, uppercase black letters centered below the title.
- **Legend**: Three colored dots with labels:
  - Blue dot → “Yoga”
  - Orange dot → “Shaolin”
  - Green dot → “Fitness”
- **Background Decor**: Faint gray lotus flower outlines appear in the top-right and left margins; abstract brushstroke swirls decorate the right side of the schedule.

---

## Daily Schedule Layout

Each day (Monday–Friday) is presented in a white rounded rectangle with a subtle drop shadow. Activities are listed as colored pills with icons, times, and descriptions.

### Monday

- **12:00 – 13:00**  
  🟠 *Shaolin QIGONG*  
  Icon: Silhouette of person in martial arts stance

- **13:00 – 14:00**  
  🔵 *YOGA*  
  with the Embassy of India  
  Icon: Person in seated yoga pose

- **13:10 – 14:00**  
  🟢 *OSTEOPOROSIS Prevention*  
  Icon: Person stretching arms upward

> Note: Two activities overlap slightly in time (Yoga ends at 14:00, Osteoporosis starts at 13:10).

---

### Tuesday

- **12:00 – 13:00**  
  🟢 *YOGASTHENICS*  
  Icon: Dumbbell

- **13:00 – 14:00**  
  🔵 *YOGA*  
  with the Embassy of India  
  Icon: Person in seated yoga pose

- **13:00 – 14:00**  
  🟠 *TAIJI (24 forms)*  
  with Gabi  
  Icon: Silhouette of person in Tai Chi stance

> Note: Yoga and Taiji run concurrently from 13:00–14:00.

---

### Wednesday

- **12:00 – 13:00**  
  🟢 *CALISTHENICS (w/ VIC Runners)*  
  Icon: Running figure

- **13:00 – 14:00**  
  🔵 *YOGA*  
  Icon: Person in seated yoga pose

---

### Thursday

- **12:00 – 13:00**  
  🟠 *Shaolin KUNG FU*  
  Icon: Silhouette of person in martial arts stance

- **13:00 – 14:00**  
  🔵 *YOGA*  
  Icon: Person in seated yoga pose

---

### Friday

- **13:00 – 14:00**  
  🔵 *PRANAYAMA*  
  Icon: Head profile with breath lines (symbolizing breathing exercise)

---

## Footer Section

- **Registration Banner**: Dark navy-blue bar at bottom with white text:  
  > “Register online at https://vichealth.club”

- **QR Code**: Bottom-right corner contains a QR code with a small globe icon embedded in its center — likely linking to the registration page or club website.

---

## Color Palette & Design Notes

- **Primary Colors**: Blue (Yoga), Orange (Shaolin), Green (Fitness)
- **Background**: Off-white / cream with soft shadows and decorative elements
- **Typography**: Clean, modern sans-serif fonts; consistent hierarchy
- **Icons**: Simple black silhouettes inside white circles within each activity pill
- **Visual Flow**: Vertical list by day, horizontal alignment of activities per day
- **Notable Features**:
  - Overlapping time slots on Monday and Tuesday suggest flexible scheduling or parallel sessions.
  - Collaboration noted with “Embassy of India” for Yoga classes.
  - Instructor named (“Gabi”) for Taiji class.
  - QR code adds digital accessibility.

---

This schedule promotes a balanced mix of mind-body practices (Yoga, Pranayama), traditional martial arts (Shaolin, Taiji), and physical fitness (Calisthenics, Yogasthenics, Osteoporosis Prevention), catering to diverse wellness interests.
